phrases.intent_en: Where do I pay for drinks at the bar
phrases.text_local: Kde zaplatím za pití na baru?
phrases.cultural_note: In many Czech pubs, you pay the bartender directly at the tap when ordering drinks.

likely_response.local: Přímo u výčepu, vlevo od vchodu.
likely_response.translation_en: Right at the taproom, left of the entrance.

responses.english: Right at the taproom, left of the entrance.
responses.local: Přímo u výčepu, vlevo od vchodu.

phrases.intent_en: Is the beer garden open tonight
phrases.text_local: Je dnes večer otevřená pivní zahrádka?
phrases.cultural_note: Beer gardens may close early due to weather or low season, even in summer.

phrases.intent_en: How do I order food at my table
phrases.text_local: Jak si můžu objednat jídlo ke stolu?
phrases.cultural_note: In Czech pubs, table service is standard for food; you don't order at the counter.

likely_response.local: Obsluha k vám přijde, stačí chvilku počkat.
likely_response.translation_en: The server will come to you, just wait a moment.

responses.english: The server will come to you, just wait a moment.
responses.local: Obsluha k vám přijde, stačí chvilku počkat.
